title: Kinetic Flow Strategy File
description: schema_version 2 (exchange-agnostic instrument block) is the CANONICAL strategy file shape; all live strategy files are v2. The schema_version 1 (OKX-coupled, okx_inst_id) branch is TRANSITIONAL/DEPRECATED and retained only for backward-compatible validation of legacy files -- the runtime v1->v2 loader bridge was removed in Layer C and v1 will be dropped in a later slice.

no_inline_credentials.comment: Credentials are NEVER stored in a strategy file; they are resolved by the adapter from per-exchange namespaced env (REFACTOR_PLAN.md §0.4). Forbid them explicitly, independent of additionalProperties.

execution_mode.description: Operative execution control. 'demo' routes to the exchange sandbox (paper/demo account via CCXT); 'live' targets the real exchange and additionally requires the global HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true kill switch before any real-money order is sent.

exchange.comment: Selects the exchange (REFACTOR_PLAN.md §0.4). Credentials are resolved by the adapter from per-exchange namespaced env, never from the strategy.

inst_id.comment: Venue instrument id. Accepts OKX-native (BTC-USDT-SWAP) and CCXT-unified (BTC/USDT:USDT) forms.

reinvest.description: Compounding switch. True (default, also when the key is absent): orders size off equity = budget_usd (seed) + realized net P&L from the closed-trade ledger, scoped to the strategy's account mode (demo|live) and accounting window; equity <= 0 blocks new opens (never closes). False: orders always size off the fixed budget_usd seed.

max_notional_usd.description: Phase A (A1) optional absolute per-strategy pre-trade notional ceiling (USD). Independent of budget_usd x leverage. An order whose planned_notional_usd exceeds min(this, HERMX_MAX_NOTIONAL_USD) is refused before it reaches the venue. Unset => no per-strategy cap.

execution_mode.description: Operative — controls account routing. 'demo' uses the exchange sandbox/paper account via CCXT; 'live' uses the real account and additionally requires HERMX_LIVE_TRADING=true.

submit_orders.description: Whether orders are actually submitted. False = Pause: the strategy still validates, ledgers, and renders, but NO order is sent to either the sandbox or live account. True (default) = orders are submitted to the account selected by execution_mode.
